title: Vileda SuperMocio Bucket
features: Bucket made of strong and durable plastic with a sturdy metal handle
description: Product Description The Vileda Bucket is ideal for use with the Vileda SuperMocio and Vileda SuperMocio Micro. The bucket has a large 10 Litre capacity and is made from highly durable plastic for longer life. Safety Warning Do not ingest. Keep away from moisture. Store in a cool, dry place. Box Contains 1 x Bucket Manufacturer Contact Information Freudenberg Household Products LP, 2 Chichester Street, Rochdale, Lancashire, OL16 2AX. See more

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Patented spinner, specially designed for Spanish mops/brooms that tightens over the entire fringe for optimal and easy spinning.
